project_description: 與團隊一起撰寫及編輯Ign!te通訊,為貧困孩子發聲

organization.name: World Vision Hong Kong
organization.description: World Vision Hong Kong is committed to serving the vulnerable and poor in nearly 100 countries. We provide appropriate assistance and support to address the specific needs of communities, which includes emergency relief as well as long-term development work. We also organise education talks, advocacy campaigns and activities to raise awareness of global issues in Hong Kong and Macau. Vision Statement Our vision for every child, life in all its fullness; Our prayer for every heart, the will to make it so. Mission Statement World Vision is an international partnership of Christians whose mission is to follow our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ in working with the poor and oppressed to promote human transformation, seek justice, and bear witness to the good news of the Kingdom of God.

what_we_need: 招募修讀任何科目,18-24歲的大專生申請,歡迎對新聞傳播、創意寫作、圖像設計有興趣的同學報名
名額所限,報名後須進行甄選;本會將以WhatsApp聯絡
義工必須出席線上簡介會(2025年2月10日下午5-6時)
透過資料搜集,發掘中學及大專生有興趣的全球發展及救援議題並主力出版不少於2篇Ign!te通訊
與團隊一起撰寫及編輯Ign!te通訊,為貧困孩子發聲
project_details.background: 香港世界宣明會透過定期出版中英文電子青年通訊 - Ign!te,鼓勵中學生了解發展中國家貧困兒童的真實處境及其生命故事,培養世界公民意識。現招募義務編輯,使與我們一起透過文字、多媒體及網絡,推動生命教育工作。
project_details.what_we_have: 完成所有活動後,義工將獲發「宣明會教育大使計劃」證書。
project_details.why_important: 香港世界宣明會透過定期出版中英文電子青年通訊 - Ign!te,鼓勵中學生了解發展中國家貧困兒童的真實處境及其生命故事,培養世界公民意識。
